name: /cost-report --by=skill aggregates totals per skill dimension per H-12
command: mkdir -p rollup/daily && printf '%s' '{"entries":[{"skill":"sync","tokens_in":100,"tokens_out":50,"invocations":1},{"skill":"sync","tokens_in":200,"tokens_out":75,"invocations":1}]}' > rollup/daily/2026-05-25.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cost-report.sh" --window=daily --by=skill --rollup-dir=rollup --format=json >out.json 2>/dev/null && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.totals.sync.tokens_in===300?0:1)' && echo grouped 1>&2
